ongoing_stories.headline: China MIIT suspends all new AV permits following Apollo Go mass outage in Wuhan
ongoing_stories.last_status: Freeze ongoing as of 2026-06-01; no resumption timeline announced. Wuhan Apollo Go service remains halted. All pending applications for expanded testing areas and new commercial permits suspended indefinitely. Regulators demanded comprehensive stress test of fleet communication infrastructure. Affects Apollo Go, WeRide, Pony.ai, and all China AV operators.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo NHTSA voluntary recall of 3,791 vehicles — flooding road incident, software fix pending
ongoing_stories.last_status: Recall open as of 2026-06-01. Triggered by April 20 incident where unoccupied Waymo entered floodwaters in San Antonio (Salado Creek). Interim OTA fix deployed; final remedy still being developed. Affects 5th- and 6th-generation Waymo Driver systems across all operating cities. San Antonio service resumption expected imminently.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo voluntarily suspends all freeway rides in SF/LA/Phoenix/Miami — construction zone navigation issues
ongoing_stories.last_status: Suspension ongoing as of 2026-06-01 across SF, LA, Phoenix, Miami. Triggered by viral video of vehicle navigating through highway construction cones. Company integrating technical learnings; expects to resume soon but no date announced. Root cause not publicly disclosed. Surface street service continues. Atlanta and San Antonio separately paused for flooding.
